markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 51. Tex. Coastal Waterway Act
##### § 51.010 — Property Acquisition

The commission, through the department, may acquire an interest in property required for a project to beneficially use dredge material in the manner provided by Section 51.005 (Land Acquisition) .

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.06(b), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The commission, through the department, may acquire an interest in property required for a project to beneficially use dredge material in the manner provided by Section 51.005 (Land Acquisition) .
